requirement.statement: The system SHALL expose scoped, bounded log queries for `RunDetachedBash` tasks while they are pending, running, suspended, or terminal.

case.name: Query recent stdout only
case.given: a `RunDetachedBash` task has emitted stdout and stderr chunks
case.when: the caller queries detached logs with `sources=["stdout"]`
case.then: the response SHALL include only stdout log entries
the response SHALL include sequence metadata for follow-up polling

case.name: Query recent stderr only
case.given: a `RunDetachedBash` task has emitted stderr chunks
case.when: the caller queries detached logs with `sources=["stderr"]`
case.then: the response SHALL include only stderr log entries
stdout entries SHALL NOT be included

case.name: Query log range by sequence
case.given: a `RunDetachedBash` task has emitted ordered log chunks
case.then: the response SHALL include only entries with sequence greater than `after_seq`
the response SHALL include the next sequence cursor

case.name: Log retention rolls over
case.given: a `RunDetachedBash` task emits more logs than the configured retention limits
case.then: the query response SHALL report dropped entry or byte metadata
the remaining entries SHALL preserve monotonic sequence ordering

requirement.statement: The system SHALL expose recent message and execution event queries for detached `RunDelegateActor` tasks.

case.name: Query recent assistant messages
case.given: a detached delegate actor has produced assistant messages and tool events
case.then: the response SHALL include only assistant message entries
the response SHALL include sequence metadata for follow-up polling

case.name: Query recent tool events
case.given: a detached delegate actor has started and completed tool calls
case.then: the response SHALL include tool call and tool result entries
ordinary assistant text SHALL NOT be included unless requested

case.name: Query message range and limit
case.given: a detached delegate actor has many message entries
case.then: the response SHALL honor the requested range and limits
it SHALL report truncation or dropped-entry metadata when applicable

requirement.statement: The system SHALL provide a focused result query for detached tasks that returns terminal status and final output.

case.name: Completed detached bash result
case.when: the caller queries the detached result
case.then: the response SHALL include terminal status, final output summary, and available stdout/stderr tail data
the response SHALL indicate whether logs were truncated or rolled over

case.name: Completed delegate result
case.when: the caller queries the detached result
case.then: the response SHALL include terminal status and final assistant result text
the caller MAY request a bounded recent message tail in the same response

case.name: Result requested before terminal state
case.given: a detached task is not yet completed, failed, or cancelled
case.when: the caller queries the detached result without allowing partial results
case.then: the response SHALL report that the task is not terminal
it SHALL include the current task status

requirement.statement: The system SHALL preserve existing detached task status behavior while adding observability-specific tools.

case.name: Existing status query remains valid
case.given: a caller uses `DetachedActorStatus` for an existing detached task
case.then: the status response SHALL continue to include task id, kind, status, timestamps, child identifiers, output text, and error
callers needing logs or message tails SHALL use the new observability query tools
